task_completion.description: Open the ECR document to read the new dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or document viewer is open showing the ECR document (ECR-HVAC-2247) with the new dimensions.

task_completion.description: Open the duct_elbow_current.slvs model in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application is open, displaying an L-shaped rectangular duct elbow cross-section.

task_completion.description: Update the four parametric dimension constraints in the SolveSpace model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dimension labels on the SolveSpace canvas or in the property browser show the updated values: 300.0 (total width), 240.0 (total height), 130.0 (leg height), and 70.0 (wall thickness).

task_completion.description: Save the updated design as duct_elbow_updated.slvs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'duct_elbow_updated.slvs' or the SolveSpace window title updated to reflect this new filename.

task_completion.description: Export the updated design to a DXF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog showing the filename 'duct_elbow_updated.dxf' or a file manager window showing the newly created 'duct_elbow_updated.dxf' file in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to modify the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the SolveSpace graphical interface to change dimensions, not just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to manually edit the .slvs file contents.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the .slvs file opened in a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely exported the DXF file using SolveSpace.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SolveSpace export dialog or menu being used, rather than a terminal command creating an empty or fake .dxf file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ECR document (ECR-HVAC-2247) specifies the following new dimensions for the duct elbow: Total width = 300.0 mm, Total height = 240.0 mm, Leg height = 130.0 mm, and Wall thickness = 70.0 mm. The agent must update the SolveSpace model to these exact dimensions.
